basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Estate Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Estate Supervisor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation applicable as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in any Discipline with Five years' experience (Preferably in Fire Safety, Security, Transport and Estate Management), SSLC for Ex-Serviceman with not less than 15 years of service in the Armed forces with experience related to Estate and Transport
qualification.details: Graduation in any Discipline with Five years' experience (Preferably in Fire Safety, Security, Transport and Estate Management). OR SSLC for Ex-Serviceman with not less than 15 years of service in the Armed forces with experience related to Estate and Transport.

salary_details.details: Rs. 24,000/- per month + Rs.300/- telephone allowance

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Estate Supervisor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

IIM Kozhikode Estate Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Estate Supervisor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Estate Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Estate Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Estate Supervisor post at IIM Kozhikode is 09 July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Estate Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduation in any Discipline with five years of relevant experience. Ex-Servicemen with SSLC and 15 years of service in the Armed forces with relevant experience are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Estate Supervisor position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Estate Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 24,000 to Rs. 24,300 per month, along with a telephone allowance of Rs. 300.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Estate Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Estate Supervisor post at the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIM Kozhikode Estate Supervisor recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Estate Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Estate Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job (permanent or contract)?
faq.answer: The Estate Supervisor position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of IIM Kozhikode is also provided.
